title: Stainless Steel Balloon Whisk Set 8 Inch - Kitchen Egg Beater for Blending, Beating, Stirring, Cooking and Baking
features: 【High Quality and Durability】The kitchen manual whisk set is made of high quality durable stainless steel wires, strong and durable, perfect design can achieve the best mixing effect, bring you a relaxing cooking experience.
【Practical And Durable】 Stainless steel balloon shape whip is ideal for mixing eggs, sauces and topping, Also a good help for mixture of ice, sugar, melted chocolate and fresh cream.
【Easy to Clean and Store】Our Stainless Steel whisk set is rust resistant, non stick and easy to clean. The stainless steel ends allow easy hanging on any hook in your kitchen for easy storage.
【Exquisite size】 (8" 10" 12") A set of different sizes of egg beaters. Polished stainless steel wire and narrow shape are ideal for mixing in small bowls or containers

【Widely Used】Our egg beater can be widely used for daily cooking, cake baking, food seasoning, etc. Great kitchen utensil and cooking helper for you to make batters, sauces, soups, cookies, whipped creams, dressings and scramble eggs.
description: Product Description Flexable This wisk kitchen tool come in 3 sizes - 12 inch, 10 inch, and 8 inch. This three piece kitchen wisks utensil set will blend in well when you're trying to outfit your kitchen with everything you need to keep your chef at home happy as can be. Outstanding Features Quality stainless steel Sturdy and durable Comfortable handle Designed hooks MULTI-FUNCTIONAL USE This stainless steel balloon whisk set is a good assistant for whisking eggs, icing sugar mixture and melted chocolate fresh cream. Enable your household more easier and effective.
